title: Manually Reset Tipper Stats From the Overall System Aveva API Page
summary: Use the Overall System Aveva API page to locate and activate the Reset Tipper Stats control. The source indicates tipper metrics are normally reset when a new sort plan is loaded, but they can also be manually reset from this page.
when_to_use: Use when tipper statistics need to be manually reset from the Overall System Aveva API page and the Reset Tipper Stats control is available.
not_for: Do not use as a validated post-reset verification procedure; the source does not provide validation steps after the reset.
Do not use when the Reset Tipper Stats control is missing or non-responsive; escalate instead.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Overall System Aveva API page, identify the Reset Tipper Stats control, confirm the page note about reset behavior, and perform the manual reset.

safety_notes: The source does not identify special safety hazards for this page action.
Do not assume production stop or lockout/tagout requirements from this source; they are not stated.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page
Reset Tipper Stats control on the HMI page

access_required: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page
system_preconditions: The Overall System Aveva API page is available.
The Reset Tipper Stats control is present on the page.

visual_references.description: Overall System Aveva API page showing Reset Tipper Stats and related controls.

steps.failure_condition: The page cannot be opened or does not display the expected controls.

steps.title: Verify the page note about reset behavior
steps.purpose: Confirm the source-supported note that tipper metrics can reset automatically with a new sort plan or be manually reset from this page.
steps.instruction: Verify the page note indicating the metrics are reset when a new sort plan is loaded but can also be manually reset.
steps.expected_result: The page note or associated source evidence confirms the reset behavior.
steps.healthy_condition: The reset behavior is consistent with the source: automatic on new sort plan load and also available manually.
steps.failure_condition: The note is not visible or the operator cannot confirm the reset behavior from the available page evidence.

actions.label: Confirm reset note

steps.title: Use Reset Tipper Stats
steps.purpose: Perform the manual reset of tipper statistics from the page.
steps.instruction: Use the Reset Tipper Stats control to perform the manual reset.
steps.expected_result: Tipper statistics are manually reset from the page.
steps.healthy_condition: The Reset Tipper Stats control responds as expected and the manual reset action is completed.
steps.failure_condition: The Reset Tipper Stats control does not respond as expected or the reset cannot be completed.
